title: Doom
description: At the end of the enemy turn, if it has at least as much Doom as HP, it dies.
smart_description: At the end of the creature's turn, if it has Doom stacks equal to or exceeding its maximum HP, it dies.
notes: Doom is a counter-type debuff that stacks through various effects. Each stack represents a damage threshold. If the afflicted creature's current HP is at or below their Doom stack count at the end of their turn, they are instantly killed and removed from combat.
